Description: Whitewashed buildings and blue accents in Oia, Santorini / I've always wanted to see the iconic Cycladic architecture and bright Aegean colors in person.
Wide view of the Eiffel Tower under a clear blue sky with Paris greenery and cityscape / chosen because it's an iconic landmark I want to see in person.
Swiss countryside with a farmhouse and small chapel on a green meadow of yellow wildflowers, with forests and mountains/ chosen for its peaceful, scenic vibe.
Red multi-tier pagoda overlooking a city with snow-capped Mount Fuji in the background/ chosen for the mix of Japanese culture and epic nature.
New York City skyline at night/ I'd love to experience the energy of the city, lights, and famous landmarks.

Wide daytime view of the Dome of the Rock with its golden dome and intricate blue tilework under a deep blue sky/ chosen because it represents my heritage and makes me feel nostalgic, especially since we are not allowed to go there.
Petra's Treasury carved into sandstone/ I'd love to explore the ancient city and its dramatic rock-cut architecture.
Machu Picchu at sunrise with misty mountains/ this place feels legendary and I want to hike and see the ruins above the clouds.

A sunny coastal marina packed with boats and yachts beside a green cliffside town, overlooking a calm deep-blue sea/ chosen because I'd love to explore a lively Mediterranean-style harbor and relax by the water.
Saint Basil's Cathedral in Moscow at night during snowfall, glowing under city lights/ chosen because the winter atmosphere looks magical and I want to experience Red Square in the snow.
